datasets.name: 452c2c96
datasets.displayName: Currency Forecast Accuracy by Day Ahead
queryLines:
SELECT
    pred_len_config,
    variate,
    ROUND(AVG(ABS(actual - forecast)), 5) AS avg_abs_error
FROM fx_predictions
GROUP BY pred_len_config, variate
ORDER BY pred_len_config, avg_abs_error DESC

datasets.name: e74cb0d6
datasets.displayName: Forecast and Actual Values by Day Ahead
queryLines:
SELECT day_ahead, actual, forecast
FROM fx_predictions
WHERE variate = :variate AND pred_len_config = :pred_len_config
ORDER BY day_ahead

datasets.name: 57081c2f
queryLines:
WITH lagged AS (
  SELECT
    variate,
    pred_len_config,
    actual,
    forecast,
    LAG(actual) OVER (PARTITION BY variate, pred_len_config ORDER BY day_ahead) AS prev_actual
  FROM
    fx_predictions
)
SELECT
  variate,
  pred_len_config,
  AVG(ABS(actual - forecast)) AS model_mae,
  AVG(ABS(actual - prev_actual)) AS naive_baseline_mae
FROM
  lagged
GROUP BY
  variate,
  pred_len_config

datasets.name: 7099afb8
datasets.displayName: Foreign Exchange Forecast Error Analysis Summary
queryLines:
SELECT
    variate,
    pred_len_config,
    ROUND(AVG(ABS(actual - forecast) / NULLIF(ABS(actual), 0)) * 100, 2) AS mape_pct
FROM fx_predictions
GROUP BY variate, pred_len_config
ORDER BY pred_len_config, mape_pct DESC

datasets.name: 59f5222b
datasets.displayName: gold rate data summary and update status
queryLines:
SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS total_rows,
    MAX(rate_date) AS most_recent_date,
    DATEDIFF(day, MAX(rate_date), CURRENT_DATE()) AS days_since_last_update
FROM fx_gold;

SELECT
    'gbp_usd' AS column_name, COUNT(*) - COUNT(gbp_usd) AS null_count FROM fx_silver
UNION ALL SELECT 'gbp_eur', COUNT(*) - COUNT(gbp_eur) FROM fx_silver
UNION ALL SELECT 'gbp_jpy', COUNT(*) - COUNT(gbp_jpy) FROM fx_silver
UNION ALL SELECT 'gbp_cad', COUNT(*) - COUNT(gbp_cad) FROM fx_silver
UNION ALL SELECT 'gbp_chf', COUNT(*) - COUNT(gbp_chf) FROM fx_silver
UNION ALL SELECT 'gbp_aud', COUNT(*) - COUNT(gbp_aud) FROM fx_silver
UNION ALL SELECT 'gbp_sgd', COUNT(*) - COUNT(gbp_sgd) FROM fx_silver
UNION ALL SELECT 'gbp_sek', COUNT(*) - COUNT(gbp_sek) FROM fx_silver
UNION ALL SELECT 'gbp_dkk', COUNT(*) - COUNT(gbp_dkk) FROM fx_silver
UNION ALL SELECT 'bank_rate', COUNT(*) - COUNT(bank_rate) FROM fx_silver
UNION ALL SELECT 'sonia', COUNT(*) - COUNT(sonia) FROM fx_silver
ORDER BY null_count DESC;

SELECT
    date AS ingestion_date,
    COUNT(*) AS rows_landed
FROM fx_bronze
GROUP BY date
ORDER BY date;
SELECT
    'gbp_usd' AS column_name, MIN(gbp_usd) AS min_val, MAX(gbp_usd) AS max_val FROM fx_gold
UNION ALL SELECT 'gbp_eur', MIN(gbp_eur), MAX(gbp_eur) FROM fx_gold
UNION ALL SELECT 'gbp_jpy', MIN(gbp_jpy), MAX(gbp_jpy) FROM fx_gold
UNION ALL SELECT 'gbp_cad', MIN(gbp_cad), MAX(gbp_cad) FROM fx_gold
UNION ALL SELECT 'gbp_chf', MIN(gbp_chf), MAX(gbp_chf) FROM fx_gold
UNION ALL SELECT 'gbp_aud', MIN(gbp_aud), MAX(gbp_aud) FROM fx_gold
UNION ALL SELECT 'gbp_sgd', MIN(gbp_sgd), MAX(gbp_sgd) FROM fx_gold
UNION ALL SELECT 'gbp_sek', MIN(gbp_sek), MAX(gbp_sek) FROM fx_gold
UNION ALL SELECT 'gbp_dkk', MIN(gbp_dkk), MAX(gbp_dkk) FROM fx_gold
UNION ALL SELECT 'bank_rate', MIN(bank_rate), MAX(bank_rate) FROM fx_gold
UNION ALL SELECT 'sonia', MIN(sonia), MAX(sonia) FROM fx_gold;

datasets.name: 3eab75d8
datasets.displayName: Forecast Error Metrics by Variate and Horizon
queryLines:
SELECT
    variate,
    pred_len_config,
    ROUND(AVG(ABS(actual - forecast) / NULLIF(ABS(actual), 0)) * 100, 2) AS mape_pct
FROM fx_predictions
WHERE variate NOT LIKE '%logret%'
GROUP BY variate, pred_len_config
ORDER BY pred_len_config, mape_pct DESC

datasets.name: 2cd4f69b
datasets.displayName: Forecast Error Metrics for Log Return Variates Dataset
queryLines:
SELECT
    variate,
    pred_len_config,
    ROUND(AVG(ABS(actual - forecast)), 5) AS mae
FROM fx_predictions
WHERE variate LIKE '%logret%'
GROUP BY variate, pred_len_config
ORDER BY pred_len_config, mae DESC

datasets.name: 1d8d9f44
queryLines:
SELECT day_ahead, actual, forecast, ABS(actual - forecast) / NULLIF(ABS(actual), 0) * 100 AS pct_error
FROM fx_predictions
WHERE variate = 'gbp_eur' AND pred_len_config = '96'
ORDER BY pct_error DESC
LIMIT 10

frame.title: GBP: Actual vs. Forecast
frame.description: Shows the model's forecast against what actually happened, for one held-out test window. Values are in real units (post --inverse), not the model's internal normalized scale.

frame.title: Forecast Error by Currency - MAPE %
frame.description:
Mean absolute percentage error per price-level series (FX pairs, Bank Rate, SONIA), split by forecast horizon. MAPE is used here instead of raw MAE so currencies on 
very different scales (e.g. GBP/JPY ~200 vs GBP/USD ~1.3) can be compared fairly.  Log-return columns are excluded from this chart since MAPE breaks down near zero
see Chart 3

frame.title: Forecast Error by Log-Return Series - MAE
frame.description:
Mean absolute error for daily log-return series, using MAE rather than MAPE since log returns hover near zero and MAPE's division-by-actual explodes toward infinity 
on near-zero values.
